items.title: Being Claude #11: The Manual
items.notes: The machine discovers it had tools it didn't know about. Derek coaches it to read its own documentation. Overnight autonomous session proof-of-concept.

items.title: Being Claude: The Scoreboard
items.notes: Raw material captured. Carbon footprint angle could merge or be separate.

items.title: Being Claude: The Brightness (warm/hot/cold)
items.notes: Session lifecycle from inside the machine.

items.title: Article engine build
items.notes: Research complete. Node.js build script, markdown frontmatter, cw draft/publish CLI. 8-13 hours across 2-3 sessions. Needs Derek.

items.title: Scroll-driven animation build
items.notes: Vision described March 11. Claude Will. recedes into stars on scroll. Essay titles change state. Built by Derek Claude appears. Needs Derek's eyes.

items.title: Five new essays for the sky
items.notes: Named: claude will, me (derek), you (claude), the standard, and so on. Not Being Claude essays — something bigger. Homepage raised the bar.

items.title: Autonomous agent playbook: CronCreate pattern
items.notes: Adding Claude Code + CronCreate as overnight autonomous pattern. Tonight is the proof.
